name: PortOne
description: PortOne (ex iamport) payments orchestration SDK aggregating 20+ Korean and global PGs behind a single API.

seo.title: PortOne — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: PortOne: PortOne (ex iamport) payments orchestration SDK aggregating 20+ Korean and global PGs behind a single API.

when_to_use: Aggregating Korean PG providers (KG Inicis, Toss, etc.) via single SDK
Global payment routing with 20+ Asian PSPs behind one API
Reducing Korean payment integration complexity for SaaS products

pros: Dominant position in Korean PG integrations
Single SDK for 20+ Korean and global PGs
Localized checkout UX for Korean buyers
Rapid product iteration from founder-led team
cons: Less relevant for EU or US-only merchants
review.verdict: Default orchestration choice for merchants selling to Korean buyers; niche pick elsewhere.
review.best_for: Merchants and platforms selling into South Korea who need one API across KakaoPay, Toss, NaverPay, and more.
review.not_for: EU or US merchants without meaningful Korean traffic.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
